title: Go HTTP Upload and Download Gateways · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible streaming Go file-gateway handler with one identity, byte, checksum, policy, cache, ownership, cancellation, cleanup, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in streaming Go file-gateway handler and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Apply trusted authority, authentication, authorization, method, route, headers, body, multipart, rate, and concurrency admission before storage work.
Use MaxBytesReader or bounded readers and streaming multipart iteration without ParseMultipartForm disk or memory surprises.
Delay response commitment until safe, set representation headers, stream bounded data, and record partial-write terminal states.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Http Request Admission
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 6553 during a compliance restore drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate a streaming Go file handler on request admission and goroutine cleanup; do not treat an ETag, CORS result, emulator, or successful SDK call as stronger proof than it is; then change region, range, or signed header and explain the exact failure boundary. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Apply trusted authority, authentication, authorization, method, route, headers, body, multipart, rate, and concurrency admission before storage work.

Inspect the Http Request Admission trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Http Request Admission.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for apply trusted authority, authentication, authorization, method, route, headers, body, multipart, rate, and concurrency admission before storage work. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Http Request Admission, keep Http Request Admission connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.
